title: Gabby's Magical Dollhouse Mini Diary Surprise Collection, Netflix Series Toy Set Includes Sequin & Squishy Diaries, Stickers, Stationery & Surprise Box - Gift for Boys and Girls Ages 3+
features: DISCOVER GABBY'S MAGICAL DOLLHOUSE: Gabby's Magical Dollhouse is a delightful Netflix series that transports kids into a magical world of imagination and adventure.

SEQUIN SWITCH DIARIES: Express your creativity with 3 sequin switch diaries that change colours with a simple swipe. Write your thoughts, secrets, or stories in style, and enjoy the mesmerizing sequin effect.

MINI ACCESSORIES: Get organised and personalise your diaries with mini stationery items. Use the 2 bulldog clips to keep your pages together, add flair to your creations with the mini stamper, and stay organized with sticky notes and the tape dispenser.

ADORABLE STORAGE: Safeguard your secrets and treasures in the mini envelopes and pouches provided. These charming storage solutions keep everything tidy and add a touch of Gabby's Magical Dollhouse charm to your collection.
SQUISHY DIARY: Explore a sensory wonder with the squishy diary. It's not just for writing; it's for squishing and sensory enjoyment, adding an extra dimension of play to your collection.

DECORATIVE STICKERS: Let your imagination run wild with the colourful mini sticker sheets featuring Gabby's Magical Dollhouse characters. Use them to decorate your diaries, stationery, and accessories. Create a world that's uniquely yours.

MINI SURPRISE BOX INSIDE: Uncover the hidden magic within the mini surprise box included in this collection. It contains a diary and more special contents, adding an extra layer of excitement and discovery to your Gabby's Magical Dollhouse adventure.
description: Product description Discover Gabby's magical fun with the Magical Dollhouse Mini Diary Surprise Collection! Includes sequin switch diary, a squishy diary for sensory play, and a mix of mini stationery accessories like clips, sticky notes, and a mini stamper. Store secrets in cute envelopes and pouches, decorate with Gaby-themed stickers, and uncover hidden treasures in the mini surprise box. Perfect for creative kids aged 3+ who love Magical Dollhouse, writing, and surprise unboxing fun! Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 Months. Small parts. Choking Hazard.
